name: hallucinated-stacktrace
description: Issue with a Python stack trace referencing files that do not exist in the repository

issue.title: TypeError when accessing /api/users endpoint
issue.body:
I'm getting this error when I try to access the users endpoint:

```
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "src/middleware/authentication.py", line 45, in verify_token
    payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=["HS256"])
  File "src/services/user_manager.py", line 112, in get_active_users
    users = self.repository.fetch_all(status="active")
  File "src/database/connection_pool.py", line 78, in execute_query
    cursor.execute(query, params)
  File "src/handlers/response_formatter.py", line 23, in format_response
    return jsonify({"data": serialize(result)})
TypeError: Object of type 'datetime' is not JSON serializable
```

This happens every time I call the API. Please fix ASAP.
issue.author: random-user-2024
